<> To replace one URL with another within a string in PHP you can use the str_replace function which works for repeating strings as well. Here is an example of how you can achieve this ```php $string = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $string = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $string); echo $string; ``` This will replace all occurrences of the old URL with the new one in the given string A palindrome is a word phrase or sequence that reads the same backward as forward for example the word madam or the phrase level in a palindrome the arrangement of letters is mirrored around the center which makes it symmetrical and interesting to explore
